request_payload.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how vital it is to have robust local preparedness. The data shows that communities with strong civil defense programs experience 30% fewer critical incidents. This isn't about fear—it's about responsible, pragmatic planning. Our neighbors deserve the same protections we'd want for ourselves. #CommunityResilience #SafetyFirst
